task_name: Add Live Builder Adapter Readiness Review Suite Coverage
goal: Add Live Builder Adapter Readiness Candidate checks to the shared Bluepilot review suite and document the new local review coverage.
claims: BP-074 adds Live Builder Adapter Readiness Candidate checks to the shared Bluepilot review suite.
BP-074 adds output invariant coverage that keeps network_effect, task_create_effect, execute_effect, builder_task_create_allowed, builder_execute_allowed, and live_builder_call_allowed blocked.
BP-074 does not change Live Builder Adapter Readiness Candidate runtime behavior or fixtures.
assumptions: BP-073 already introduced the local Live Builder Adapter Readiness Candidate mock and golden fixtures.
Review suite coverage should remain the shared entry point for local reviewers.
Invariant tests are needed before expanding toward any live Builder adapter handoff.
dod: tools/test-bluepilot-review-suite.cjs runs Live Builder Adapter Readiness Candidate syntax, fixtures, and invariant checks.
docs/BLUEPILOT_REVIEW_SUITE_v0.md mentions Live Builder Adapter Readiness Candidate coverage and limits.
stop_conditions: Live Builder Adapter Readiness Candidate runtime or fixture changes become necessary
Live Builder, Builder Task Create, auth, secrets, persistence, approval recording, DB, deploy, execute, approve, or push becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-073 added a local Live Builder Adapter Readiness Candidate mock but did not yet wire it into the shared Bluepilot Review Suite.
